title: Dispatch Console — Round 1
intro: Thanks for testing with us. This is an early prototype — it isn't wired to live data, so some numbers are placeholders. We're after your gut reactions on the layout and flow, not whether the data is right.

tasks.title: Get your bearings on the board
tasks.instruction:
Take a moment to look over the dispatch board without clicking anything yet.

Tell us what you think this screen is for, and what you'd expect to be able to do here.
focus: Is it clear which jobs still need a crew?
Does anything on screen feel unfamiliar or unexpected?

tasks.title: Assign a crew to an unassigned job
tasks.instruction:
Find a job that has no crew against it, and assign one of the available crews to it.

Narrate what you're looking for as you go.
focus: Was it obvious how to start the assignment?
Did you have enough information to choose the right crew?
Anything you wanted to see that wasn't there?

tasks.title: Check a crew's current status
tasks.instruction: Pick any crew and find out what they're currently working on and where they are.
focus: Could you tell at a glance whether a crew was free or busy?
Is the location detail useful, or just noise?

tasks.title: Handle a same-day reassignment
tasks.instruction: Imagine a hydrovac job just became urgent. Move it to a different crew than the one it's currently on.
focus: How risky did that action feel — were you confident it saved?
Would you trust doing this during a live shift?
